overview.zh: 自吸式浮选机是一种创新型浮选设备，通过特殊设计的叶轮和自吸管道，无需额外鼓风机即可自动吸入空气与矿浆混合。该设备结构简单，操作便捷，气泡分布均匀，能有效提高矿物回收率。适用于多种矿物的浮选分离，特别是在处理细粒矿物时表现优异，被广泛应用于有色金属、黑色金属和非金属矿物的选矿工艺中。
overview.en: The Self-priming Flotation Machine is an innovative flotation equipment that automatically draws in air to mix with slurry through specially designed impellers and self-priming pipelines, without the need for additional blowers. This equipment features a simple structure, convenient operation, and uniform bubble distribution, effectively improving mineral recovery rates. It is suitable for flotation separation of various minerals, especially performing excellently in processing fine-grained minerals, and is widely applied in beneficiation processes of non-ferrous metals, ferrous metals, and non-metallic minerals.

note.zh: 可按照客户需求进行定制
note.en: Can be customized according to customer requirements

zh: 自吸式设计，无需外部鼓风机，简化设备结构，降低投资成本
特殊叶轮结构，确保气泡细小均匀，提高矿化率
气量自动调节，适应不同矿物浮选要求
能耗低，运行成本节约，经济效益显著
安装简便，维护容易，使用寿命长
处理能力大，可单槽操作或多槽串联使用
en: Self-priming design eliminates the need for external blowers, simplifying equipment structure and reducing investment costs
Special impeller structure ensures fine and uniform bubbles, improving mineralization rate
Automatic air volume adjustment adapts to different mineral flotation requirements
Low energy consumption, reduced operating costs, significant economic benefits
Easy installation, simple maintenance, long service life
Large processing capacity, can be operated as single tank or multiple tanks in series

description.zh: 广泛用于铜、铅、锌、镍等有色金属矿物的浮选分离
description.en: Widely used in flotation separation of non-ferrous metal minerals such as copper, lead, zinc, and nickel

description.zh: 适用于铁、锰等黑色金属矿物的浮选工艺
description.en: Suitable for flotation processes of ferrous metal minerals such as iron and manganese

description.zh: 可用于石墨、萤石、长石等非金属矿物的浮选提纯
description.en: Can be used for flotation purification of non-metallic minerals such as graphite, fluorite, and feldspar

description.zh: 特别适合中小型选矿厂使用，灵活适应各种选矿需求
description.en: Especially suitable for small to medium-sized beneficiation plants, flexibly adapting to various beneficiation needs
